description: A White House graphic. The background is a photograph of Donald Trump in a navy suit, white shirt and red tie with an American-flag lapel pin, standing in front of a row of American flags. Overlaid across the middle in large white serif type (mixed italic and bold) is the text 'America is BACK.' Below are two 'Bloomberg' news-clipping cards styled as torn paper, each with a black 'Bloomberg' header and bold headline text with phrases highlighted in yellow: (1) 'Abbott to Expand US Manufacturing as Tariffs Loom' (byline 'By Madison Muller, April 16, 2025'), shown beside the gray Abbott logo; and (2) 'Honda to Shift Production of Civic From Japan to US on Tariffs' (byline 'By Nicholas Takahashi, April 16, 2025'), shown beside the Honda 'H' logo. A footer bar shows the White House engraving icon and 'The WHITE HOUSE.' Tweet text: 'A prosperous Wednesday at the White House - President Trump delivering results for America.'
notable_text: America is BACK. | Bloomberg: Abbott to Expand US Manufacturing as Tariffs Loom | Bloomberg: Honda to Shift Production of Civic From Japan to US on Tariffs | The WHITE HOUSE
